scripts.deploy:cloud: cp wrangler.cloud.jsonc wrangler.jsonc && NEXT_PUBLIC_PRODUCT=cloud opennextjs-cloudflare build && NEXT_PUBLIC_PRODUCT=cloud opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
